mapper.select: SELECT nd.node_name AS nodeName, COUNT(*) AS enterCount, AVG(COALESCE(nd.wait_duration_sec, 0)) AS avgWaitDurationSec, AVG(COALESCE(nd.process_duration_sec, 0)) AS avgProcessDurationSec, AVG(COALESCE(nd.total_duration_sec, 0)) AS avgTotalDurationSec, MAX(COALESCE(nd.total_duration_sec, 0)) AS maxTotalDurationSec FROM ticket_node_duration nd INNER JOIN ticket t ON t.id = nd.ticket_id WHERE t.workflow_id = #{workflowId} AND t.deleted = 0 AND nd.deleted = 0 GROUP BY nd.node_name
